ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in seconds */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "stop_time" TEXT /* Stop time of the trip */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the start station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end station */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used for the trip */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the trip */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predefined route taken */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the trip */,
  "is_peak_time" INTEGER /* Indicates if the trip was taken during peak hours */,
  "route_distance" REAL /* Distance of the route taken in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the bike station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Number of bike docks at the station */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicates if the station is currently open */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the station */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the station is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (e.g., available, maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the bike */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was purchased */,
  "service_life" INTEGER /* Estimated service life of the bike in years */,
  "mileage" REAL /* Total mileage covered by the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., Customer, Subscriber) */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the user */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the user (0 for female, 1 for male) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "subscription_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the user's subscription (if applicable) */,
  "subscription_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the user's subscription (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_trip_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the trip */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip taken by the user */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the trip was completed */,
  "feedback_provided" INTEGER /* Indicates if feedback was provided for the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trip_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trip_history_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_usage_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the usage statistic entry */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike being analyzed */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips taken with this bike */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered by the bike in kilometers */,
  "total_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of trips in seconds */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the bike during trips */,
  "last_maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_usage_stats_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_usage_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the station usage statistic entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station being analyzed */,
  "total_arrivals" INTEGER /* Total number of trips arriving at this station */,
  "total_departures" INTEGER /* Total number of trips departing from this station */,
  "average_wait_time" REAL /* Average wait time for bikes at the station in minutes */,
  "peak_hour" TEXT /* Peak hour for bike usage at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_usage_stats_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip the feedback relates to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user for the trip (1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user regarding the trip */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was provided */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_feedback_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_due_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the engagement record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the platform */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips taken by the user */,
  "avg_trip_duration" REAL /* Average duration of trips taken by the user */,
  "total_feedbacks" INTEGER /* Total number of feedbacks provided by the user */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the user for trips */,
  "last_trip_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last trip taken by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
